---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new for FredAI
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the gap or frustration that this feature would address.

**Proposed solution**
How you'd like Fred to handle it.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you've tried, or other approaches that could work.

**Which part of Fred does this affect?**
- [ ] Dashboard / Overview
- [ ] News page
- [ ] Signal Globe
- [ ] Portfolio / Watchlist
- [ ] Fred chat
- [ ] Technical alerts
- [ ] Installer / auto-update
- [ ] API / data sources
- [ ] Docker / deployment
- [ ] Other
